case_title: HUBERT CONDEMI VS. VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,501.00 FILED BY CONDEMI, HUBERT AS TO DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA (ASSUMED NAME: AUDI OF AMERICA) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
